title: Issue with modpaths when BUFT is in different scope

features.name: modpath with cross-scope BUFT reference
features.description: Code should include a .modpath timing specification inside a submodule where the path endpoints pass through BUFT/BUFZ functors located in a different scope, causing the timing delay to not be applied

features.name: specify block path through parent-scope signals in child module
features.description: Code should include a submodule with a .modpath that connects to a parent-scope signal via a BUFT funnel, where the BUFT exists in the child scope, breaking the specify path timing
